scripts.dev: bun run build:ui && bun run --filter desktop-app dev:web
scripts.dev:app: bun run build:ui && bun run --filter desktop-app dev:app
scripts.dev:app:hmr: bun run build:ui && bun run --filter desktop-app dev:app:hmr
scripts.check:desktop-app: bun run --filter ui prepack && bun run --filter desktop-app check
scripts.build:desktop-app: bun run --filter ui prepack && cd apps/desktop-app && bun run build
scripts.test:racing:logic: bun run --filter ui test:logic:racing && bun run --filter desktop-app test:unit:racing:model
scripts.test:racing:driving: bun run --filter ui test:logic:racing:engine && bun run --filter desktop-app test:e2e:racing:driving
scripts.test:racing:aids: bun run --filter ui test:logic:racing:physics && bun run --filter desktop-app test:e2e:racing:aids
scripts.test:racing:setup: bun run --filter desktop-app test:unit:racing:model && bun run --filter desktop-app test:e2e:racing:setup
scripts.test:racing:visual: bun run --filter ui test:visual:racing && bun run --filter desktop-app test:visual:racing
scripts.test:racing:assets: bun run --filter ui test:browser:racing && bun run --filter desktop-app test:racing:assets
scripts.test:racing: bun run test:racing:logic && bun run test:racing:driving && bun run test:racing:aids && bun run test:racing:setup && bun run test:racing:visual
scripts.test:rts:logic: bun run --filter ui test:logic:rts && bun run --filter desktop-app test:unit:rts:model
scripts.test:rts:missions: bun run --filter ui test:logic:rts:ai && bun run --filter ui test:logic:rts:engine && bun run --filter desktop-app test:unit:rts:model
scripts.test:rts:visual: bun run --filter ui test:visual:rts && bun run --filter desktop-app test:visual:rts
scripts.test:rts: bun run test:rts:logic && bun run test:rts:lobby && bun run test:rts:controls && bun run test:rts:missions && bun run test:rts:visual
